title: stelis elatissima
intro: Stelis elatissima is a flowering plant species native to Central and South America, belonging to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis elatissima include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine. Stelis elatissima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and sometimes used in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
